/usr/bin/ar qc libjoltgym_renderer.a CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/vulkan_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/swapchain_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/offscreen_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/imgui_layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/mesh_primitives.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/joltgym_renderer.dir/scene_sync.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libjoltgym_renderer.a
